subcodes.first_line: In this day the Book, without veil or hindrance, hath summoned all parties unto the most exalted horizon. He is the Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز کتاب من غیر ستر و حجاب جمیع احزاب را بافق اعلی دعوت فرمود اوست کتاب
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @unity in diversity
